Package index

All functions

abundance_estimates()
Calculate abundance estimates
add_covariates()
Add covariates to a space4time capture history object
AIC(<s4t_ageclass_model>)
Compute and return AIC of fitted model objects
AIC(<s4t_cjs_ml>)
Compute AIC of fitted model objects
anova(<s4t_ageclass_model>)
Compute likelihood ratio tests of two fitted model objects
anova(<s4t_cjs_ml>)
Compute likelihood ratio tests of two fitted model objects
clean_s4t_ch_obs()
Clean the capture history of a space4time capture history object
coef(<s4t_ageclass_model>) coefficients(<s4t_ageclass_model>)
Extract fitted model coefficients
coef(<s4t_cjs_ml>) coefficients(<s4t_cjs_ml>)
Extract fitted model coefficients
confint(<s4t_ageclass_model>)
Confidence intervals for fitted model parameters for s4t_ageclass_model
confint(<s4t_cjs_ml>)
Confidence intervals for fitted model parameters for s4t_cjs_ml
extract_ageclass_fit()
Extract s4t_ageclass_model object from a s4t_cjs_rstan or s4t_cjs_ml object
extract_covariates()
Extract indices and covariates from space4time capture history objects
fit_ageclass()
Fit age-class model using ordinal regression
fit_s4t_cjs_ml()
Fit space-for-time mark-recapture model in likelihood framework
fit_s4t_cjs_rstan()
Fit space-for-time mark-recapture model in Bayesian framework
linear_s4t_config()
Create site configuration for simple linear arrangement
loo(<s4t_cjs_rstan>)
Efficient approximate leave-one-out cross-validation (LOO)
plot(<s4t_ageclass_model>)
Plot confusion matrix for fit_ageclass objects
plotCH()
Plot summary of s4t_cjs_ch object
plotCov()
Effect plot for s4t_cjs_rstan object
plotSurvival()
Plot apparent survival estimates from fitted s4t_cjs_ml or s4t_cjs_rstanobjects
plotTransitions()
Plot transition probability estimates from fitted s4t_cjs_ml or s4t_cjs_rstanobjects
predict(<s4t_ageclass_model>)
Model predictions from fitted fit_ageclass objects
print(<clean_s4t_ch>)
Print summary of clean_s4t_ch object
print(<cov_s4t_ch>)
Print summary of cov_s4t_ch object
print(<s4t_ch>)
Print summary of s4t_ch object
print(<s4t_cjs_ml>)
Print s4t_cjs_ml
print(<s4t_cjs_rstan>)
Print summary of s4t_cjs_rstan
print(<s4t_config>)
Print summary of s4t_config object
print(<summary.s4t_cjs_ml>)
Print summary of s4t_cjs_ml
read_DART_file()
Read DART Basin TribPit observation files and combine with auxiliary age data
remove_kelt_obs()
Remove observations of kelts
s4t_ch()
Create space-for-time mark-recapture capture history object
s4t_config()
Create space4time site configuration object (s4t_config)
simplebranch_s4t_config()
Create site configuration for simple branching site arrangement
sim_simple_s4t_ch()
Simulate simple capture history
space4time
space4time
summary(<s4t_ageclass_model>)
Summarize a fitted model object
summary(<s4t_cjs_ml>)
Summarize a fitted model object
summary(<s4t_cjs_rstan>)
Summary method for s4t_cjs_rstan objects
traceplot.s4t_cjs_rstan()
Markov chain traceplots
vcov(<s4t_ageclass_model>)
Calculate variance-covariance matrix for a fitted model object
vcov(<s4t_cjs_ml>)
Calculate variance-covariance matrix for a fitted model object
waic(<s4t_cjs_rstan>)
Widely applicable information criterion (WAIC)
